calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2023 Off Calendar

Request For Dismissal Of Class Action Pursuant To Cal. Rules Of Court, Rule 3.770
Off Calendar May-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. AIDA VAN HERK, Esq. of Hamparayan Person Injury Lawyers San Diego, APC (Tel: 619-550-1355) for plaintiffs;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS ZACHARY CARR and ASHLEY COLE's Request For Dismissal Of Class Action Pursuant To Cal. Rules Of Court, Rule 3.770.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiffs' unopposed "request for dismissal of class action pursuant to Cal. Rules of Court, Rule 3.770" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
